title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at iDiscoveri Education Consulting Pvt Ltd - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at iDiscoveri Education Consulting Pvt Ltd - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the iDiscoveri Education Consulting Pvt Ltd family as a Curriculum Developer in Surat. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About iDiscoveri Education Consulting Pvt Ltd:
iDiscoveri Education Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with iDiscoveri Education Consulting Pvt Ltd!
